intro: My research has consistently focused on developing practical language technology solutions for Indian languages, including machine translation systems, linguistic tools, annotated corpora, and opensource resources. Many of these systems have been developed through externally funded projects and collaborative national initiatives and are intended for use by researchers, developers, and language technology practitioners.
